description: You are a Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Correct structural data errors in OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!, active study: Phase II Diabetes Trial) by invalidating the 'Pregnancy Status' CRF in Subject DM-102's (Male) 'Baseline Assessment' event, removing the 'Week 8 Follow-up' event for Subject DM-104 (Discontinued), and restoring the 'Vital Signs' CRF in the 'Baseline Assessment' event for Subject DM-101 (Active).
